title: Gaia Motion Triptych Editorial AI
sourceTitle: Gaia Motion Triptych Editorial AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable brand triptych editorial with three-panel editorial brand system with coordinated styling, controlled visual rhythm, and product-safe layout. You are a Senior AI Visual Strategist and Creative Director. Goal: Create a high-motion triptych editorial where every visual element - color, typography, props - is a direct semantic extension of the brand nam. Color Psychology: Build a triadic palette rooted in brand associations: -. BACKGROUND: The "Mood" color (e.g, Deep Forest for 'GAIA', Neon Amber for. Fictional Brand: GAIA MOTION. Brand Identity: organic wellness-tech brand with kinetic, earth-forward energy. Triptych Panels: portrait close-up, symbolic object lift, full-body kinetic action panel. Brand Object: transparent seed-like wearable device held above the head. Typography System: large wordmark in geometric frames, micro-slogans, and high-contrast editorial captions. Color Strategy: deep forest background, neon amber typography, ivory apparel, and lime accents. Palette: electric cyan, neon pink, acid yellow, and deep violet. Subject: Make GAIA MOTION the clear hero subject. Preserve the source prompt's subject hierarchy and avoid adding unrelated people or props. Scene and Context: Place the subject in the scene, surface, props, and context implied by this source cue: You are a Senior AI Visual Strategist and Creative Director. Keep the background details useful to the concept rather than decorative filler. Composition and Layout: Use portrait close-up, symbolic object lift, full-body kinetic action panel. Keep the layout faithful to this template's own visual mechanic and do not introduce unrelated layout systems. Style and Rendering: Render in semantic brand triptych editorial visual finish preserving these source cues: three-panel editorial structure, semantic brand analysis, color/typography/props derived from brand meaning. Keep this template's fixed material, texture, camera, illustration, or UI finish consistent across variants. Color and Lighting: Use deep forest background, neon amber typography, ivory apparel, and lime accents. Lighting should match the template mood, separate the hero subject from the background, and stay readable at thumbnail size. Visible Typography: English-only, Latin alphabet only. Use one concise English headline or short English labels only when the template needs visible writing; otherwise keep visible writing minimal, intentional, and clean. Quality Restrictions: Avoid random letters, watermarks, malformed hands or faces, broken anatomy, duplicate logos, noisy background clutter, unreadable microcopy, and off-style artifacts.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: Gaia Motion Triptych Editorial Variant 01

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable brand triptych editorial with three-panel editorial brand system with coordinated styling, controlled visual rhythm, and product-safe layout. You are a Senior AI Visual Strategist and Creative Director. Goal: Create a high-motion triptych editorial where every visual element - color, typography, props - is a direct semantic extension of the brand nam. Color Psychology: Build a triadic palette rooted in brand associations: -. BACKGROUND: The "Mood" color (e.g, Deep Forest for 'GAIA', Neon Amber for. Fictional Brand: FUSE ATELIER. Brand Identity: brutalist creative software brand with speed, craft, and electric precision. Triptych Panels: extreme face crop, medium hero gesture, full-body motion blur with tools. Brand Object: glowing modular keyboard core treated like a symbolic artifact. Typography System: bold sans-serif, oversized brand letters, kinetic microtext, and clear panel numbering. Color Strategy: charcoal background, hot orange energy type, cobalt apparel, and white highlights. Palette: cobalt blue, saffron, terracotta, palm green, and ivory. Subject: Make FUSE ATELIER the clear hero subject. Preserve the source prompt's subject hierarchy and avoid adding unrelated people or props. Scene and Context: Place the subject in the scene, surface, props, and context implied by this source cue: You are a Senior AI Visual Strategist and Creative Director.
